title: Chloe Petts: How You See Me, How You Don't
full_description: After two smash-hit sell-out runs, Chloe Petts returns to the Edinburgh Fringe with a brand-new show where she gets personal. Between her newly found trolls, oldly found school bullies, and an excellent relationship with her food tech teacher, Chloe Petts brings her trademark laddishness to tell you who she really is — all whilst her Head Girl badge glistens upon her chest.
ai_summary: Chloe Petts's third Fringe hour — prompted by a wave of online trolls after her Sky Sports Football Show — becomes a surprisingly joyful show about gender identity, class, and why a lesbian-identifying herself as a lad is more complicated than it looks.
